Bash(cd "D:\\Project\\siliconeFormula" && python3 << 'EOFPYTHON'
import openpyxl
import sys

try:
    # Load the workbook
    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\("APIS 배합툴설계-크로스폴리머2 \(1\).xlsx"\)
    
    # Get the sheet
    sheet_name = "일반-물성탭"
    if sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
        ws = wb[sheet_name]
        
        # Print first few rows to see the header structure
        print\("First 5 rows of the sheet:"\)
        print\("=" * 100\)
        for row_idx, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=5, values_only=False\), 1\):
            print\(f"Row {row_idx}:"\)
            for col_idx, cell in enumerate\(row, 1\):
                merged_info = ""
                # Check if cell is part of a merged cell
                for merged_range in ws.merged_cells.ranges:
                    if cell.coordinate in merged_range:
                        merged_info = f" [MERGED: {merged_range}]"
                print\(f"  Col {col_idx}: {cell.value}{merged_info}"\)
        
        print\("\\n" + "=" * 100\)
        print\("\\nMerged cells in this sheet:"\)
        for merged_range in ws.merged_cells.ranges:
            print\(f"  {merged_range}"\)
            
    else:
        print\(f"Sheet '{sheet_name}' not found."\)
        print\(f"Available sheets: {wb.sheetnames}"\)
        
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Error: {e}"\)
    sys.exit\(1\)
EOFPYTHON)
